import React from 'react'; const About = () => { return (

About Me

Hi, I'm **Pasham Shivanagu Reddy**, a final-year Computer Science Engineering student and an aspiring **Java Backend Developer** with a passion for building scalable and efficient backend applications. I have hands-on experience developing RESTful APIs and full-stack applications using **Java, Spring Boot, React.js, JavaScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, AWS, Git, and GitHub**. Through my internship, I worked on real-world software development, collaborated in an Agile environment, and gained practical experience in writing clean, maintainable, and production-ready code. Beyond academics, I'm an **active Open Source Contributor**, contributing to real-world Java projects by fixing issues and submitting pull requests. I have also solved **300+ Data Structures & Algorithms problems**, strengthening my problem-solving and coding skills. I'm always eager to learn new technologies, contribute to impactful products, and grow as a software engineer by building reliable, scalable, and user-focused applications.

Education

B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

Sree Dattha Institute of Engineering and Science, Hyderabad, Telangana

2023 - Present

CGPA: 8.54

Personal Info
